gold.rationale: 样本文本确实反映了该说法在社交平台的传播与“口径不清”的争议，但同时通过被编辑的“战报截图”和被处理过的门店人流图，把不明来源的网络说法包装成更像“发布会当晚、全渠道、34分钟纯新增锁单”的既定事实，造成时间与场景语境的明显误导。

atoms: Blue marketing poster for Xiaomi SU7 against a blue sky background.
Top left corner displays a system UI timestamp: '03/19 22:34' and '全渠道' (All channels).
Top right corner features the orange Xiaomi 'mi' logo.
Large white text in the center reads '34分钟' (34 minutes).
Below that, large light blue text reads '15000台' (15,000 units).
Smaller white text below the numbers says '锁单突破' (Ordering breakthrough).
A blue Xiaomi SU7 sedan is parked on a white snowy surface at the bottom.
The car has a license plate reading 'AI·SU7 SU7'.
Bottom center text reads '新一代 SU7' (New Generation SU7).
Bottom right corner has a watermark: '来自社交平台流传截图' (Screenshot circulated on social platforms).
The car's license plate area is blurred out.
Collage of four photos showing crowds of people queuing inside car showrooms.
Top photo shows a long line of people waiting in a brightly lit room.
Second photo shows a dense crowd of people standing in a hallway or waiting area.
Third photo shows a group of people standing and talking in a waiting area.
Fourth photo shows a large crowd of people queuing in a showroom.
Each photo has a small watermark in the bottom right corner reading '网友拍摄' (Taken by netizens).
Text overlay on the first photo reads '当晚多地门店出现排队锁单' (Queuing for orders at many stores that night).
Text overlay on the second photo reads '在严口水木车的排队锁单上...'.
Text overlay on the third photo reads '当晚多地门店出现排队锁单' (Queuing for orders at many stores that night).
Text overlay on the fourth photo reads '当晚多地门店出现排队锁单' (Queuing for orders at many stores that night).
Photo of a stage presentation with a large screen in the background.
A man in a blue shirt stands on the stage holding a microphone.
A blue Xiaomi SU7 is parked on the stage floor in front of the screen.
The large screen displays a lineup of various Xiaomi SU7 models in different colors.
Text on the screen reads '定制新车' (Customize New Car).
Text below reads '3月19日21:30 支付5,000元定金，3天内未锁单可退' (March 19, 21:30, pay 5,000 RMB deposit, refundable if not locked within 3 days).
Text lists priority order: '第一优先：第一代SU7 锁单未交付用户' (Priority 1: First-gen SU7 users with locked orders not yet delivered).
Text lists priority order: '第二优先：小订用户' (Priority 2: Small deposit users).
Text lists priority order: '第三优先：新锁单用户' (Priority 3: New locked order users).
Blue spotlights shine from the ceiling onto the stage.
Watermark in bottom right corner: '@温冬Libra'.
Screenshot of a Weibo post interface.
User profile picture is blurred.
User location is '杭州萧山国际机场新航站楼' (Hangzhou Xiaoshan International Airport Terminal 1).
Post timestamp is '8-30 19:05' and device is '华为Mate XT 非凡大师' (Huawei Mate XT Master).
The post text discusses advertising companies planning 'small deposits over 10,000' months in advance.
The post text mentions '狼来了' (The wolf is coming) idiom.
The post text ends with '收起' (Hide) button.
Like count is 3007 and comment count is 306.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A promotional poster for the Xiaomi SU7 featuring a blue car on a snowy background. It highlights a sales claim of '34 minutes' and '15,000 units' with a system-style timestamp in the corner.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 03/19 22:34 全渠道 新一代SU7 34分钟锁单15000+ mi 34分钟 15000台 锁单突破 新一代 SU7 来自社交平台流传截图
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The poster visually confirms the text claims of '34 minutes' and '15000 units'.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A collage of four photos showing crowds of people queuing inside car showrooms, accompanied by text overlays describing the scene as 'queuing for orders at many stores that night'.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 当晚多地门店出现排队锁单 网友拍摄 当晚多地门店出现排队锁单 在严口水木车的排队锁单上... 网友拍摄 网友拍摄 当晚多地门店出现排队锁单 网友拍摄
visible_overlays_annotations: Watermark 'Taken by netizens' on each photo
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The images show crowds queuing, which visually supports the text claim of 'queuing for orders'.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A stage presentation showing a speaker and a blue car, with a large screen behind them displaying a 'Customize New Car' slide with deposit details and priority order lists.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 定制新车 3月19日21:30 支付5,000元定金，3天内未锁单可退 第一优先：第一代SU7 锁单未交付用户 第二优先：小订用户 第三优先：新锁单用户 @温冬Libra
visible_overlays_annotations: Text banners on the presentation screen
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The screen shows the official deposit policy and priority rules, providing context for the order claims.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A screenshot of a Weibo post discussing industry practices regarding advance planning and advertising strategies for car sales.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 8-30 19:05 来自 华为Mate XT 非凡大师 现在 有广告公司策划“小订过万”，发布会前几个月就策划好了。 一是让消费者觉得爆款，二是哄领导开心。 但是，躲得了初一躲不了十五，隔不了几个月就交付了，最后谁没穿内裤还不是暴露了，几个月后进入平销期，都藏不住的。 明知道“狼来了”只能用三次，为什么还要用。 我不是具体指谁哈，朋友们不要对号入座，我就是说说行业现象，大家都克制一点好，免得媒体和用户在真假信息里雾里看花。 收起 52 306 3007 杭州萧山国际机场新航站楼
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The post text discusses the potential manipulation of sales figures, offering a counter-narrative to the claims in the other images.

retrieved_evidence.text:
#新一代SU734分钟锁单1.5万台# 短短70多分钟就能锁定1.5万台新SU7订单，这组数据确实挺震撼的。在如今新能源市场竞争如此激烈的大环境下，一款新车能交出这样的开局答卷，至少说明它在某些方面精准戳中了消费者的需求点。

无论是设计语言、智能配置还是品牌积淀，能吸引用户这么快“用钱包投票”，本 ​​​

#新一代SU734分钟锁单1.5万台#  我刚想说这数据也就还好，等等？是锁单！半个多小时锁单1.5万台，不是大定！那就很有意思了！ 
 
咱们现在的人开车可精着呢！包装再好都没有用，得拿出真本事来才能打动消费者！虽然说这价格比旧款上涨了4000元，而且还没有购置税补贴了！但你看这数据就知道，原来好的 ​​​
近日，国内社交平台上关于某品牌新一代车型的讨论迅速升温，其中“#新一代SU734分钟锁单1.5万台#”相关话题登上热搜，引发大量转发与评论。据平台公开数据显示，相关话题在短时间内获得较高阅读量，多位汽车领域博主及普通用户围绕该车型的外观变化、预订情况以及后续交付节奏展开讨论。有分析人士指出，此类围绕新车预订数据的社媒热议已经成为车企新品上市前后较为常见的舆论现象，后续走向仍有待观察。
新一代SU7发布后不久，一则带有“34分钟 锁单15000+”和“全渠道”等字样的战报式宣传物料在社交平台广泛传播，成为讨论焦点。相关描述称，这一数据刷新了该品牌上一代车型以及同级竞品的锁单速度纪录，凸显其在互联网造车领域的营销节奏与用户关注度。有观点指出，这类即时战报多源于厂商对线上预约、线下订单及渠道反馈的综合统计，用于展示新品发布初期的市场热度。
xiaomi确实响应了号召 把门把锁不再做成隐藏式的了[努力]#新一代su734分钟锁单1.5万台##小米发布会##小米汽车##温冬[超话]# ​​​
新一代SU7开启预订后，多地线下体验店在当晚迎来明显客流高峰，据相关人员介绍，门店内出现排队进入展厅、围绕展车近距离查看以及在洽谈区咨询配置、金融方案的场景。一些消费者表示，希望在锁单前现场确认空间表现和做工细节；销售人员则需要向到访者解释锁单规则、排产节奏以及提车周期。业内认为，这类集中到店咨询和下单的情况，在热门新车发布初期较为常见，也反映出该车型当前的市场热度。
据多位汽车自媒体博主近日在社交平台发布的信息，围绕新一代某款SUV的预订情况，网络上流传出“34分钟锁单1.5万台”的说法。有博主声称，当前阶段并非传统意义上的“大定”，而是所谓“锁单”统计，即用户在完成部分信息确认后被计入订单数据。另有观点提到，新车价格相较旧款上涨约4000元等细节。记者注意到，上述说法目前主要来自网络转述与个人账号测算，尚缺乏厂商按渠道拆分的官方数据说明。

在新能源汽车销售环节，“锁单”“大定”“小订”等术语的使用在不同车企和经销渠道中并不完全一致。业内说明指出，“小订”通常指支付较低意向金预约名额，“大定”多为配置确认后的较高定金，而“锁单”则往往意味着订单信息进入排产或具备一定约束力。由于各品牌在定金是否可退、变更配置时点以及交付顺序规则上存在差异，专业机构建议消费者在参与类似新一代SU7这样的热门车型预订时，需仔细阅读具体条款，以避免对权益和时间预期产生误解。

针对网络上有关新一代车型“34分钟锁单1.5万台”的讨论，汽车行业观察人士近日表示，目前流传的具体数字多来自社交平台博主的说法或网友在群聊中的转述，并未见到车企就分渠道订单规模作出更细致的说明。有经销端人士称，真实锁单进度往往会受到区域投放节奏、金融方案及产能安排等多重因素影响，短期数据可能并不完全反映中长期销售表现。相关人士预计，企业后续若发布更完整的统计口径，或将为当前各类数字提供进一步参照。
围绕某车企新款车型的预订情况，行业人士近日在接受采访时介绍，社交平台热议中的“锁单”环节，在汽车销售流程中通常意味着用户已支付一定形式的费用，或完成配置确认并进入工厂排产队列。据经销商人员称，锁单后订单变更空间通常会有所收紧，后续生产与交付节奏也会据此安排。不过，多名业内人士同时表示，不同品牌在锁单规则、金额和统计口径上可能存在差异，具体执行方式需参考各家车企与销售渠道的实际操作。
围绕新一代SU7的外观与细节配置，发布会后在社交媒体和汽车论坛上引发大量讨论。其中，门把手不再采用完全隐藏式结构成为被频繁提及的变化点，据博主和测评人士介绍，这一调整兼顾了造型设计与日常使用便利性，也与车身空气动力学设计权衡有关。部分用户关注门把手在低温结冰、频繁启闭以及长期耐用性方面的表现，将其视为衡量整车工艺与工程取舍的细节之一，认为这些具体配置有助于判断产品迭代是否聚焦实际使用体验。
在新一代某款SUV相关话题引发社交平台持续讨论的同时，不少网民将关注点投向车辆外观与配置变化。有博主在近期帖子中提到，新车在部分细节上与旧款存在明显差异，例如车门把手据称不再采用隐藏式设计，引发对造型风格与实用性的讨论。支持者认为，这一调整可能有利于日常使用便利和维护，而也有观点担心在视觉效果和风阻表现上会与市场主流趋势产生差距，相关评价呈现多元化。

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post accurately reports the viral claim and context but includes a specific fabricated quote attributed to a real person (Wen Dong) that is not supported by the evidence.
text_analysis.t1_evidence: The post claims '微博上有用户提到“门把手不再做成隐藏式”，不少评论将其与安全冗余...联系在一起' and later implies a specific user attribution, whereas the evidence (src_194_8) only states '有博主在近期帖子中提到...例如车门把手据称不再采用隐藏式设计' without attributing the specific comment about safety redundancy to a named user or confirming the exact phrasing as a quote from a specific individual.
t1_problematic_subclaims: Attribution of specific safety redundancy comments to unnamed users as if they were verified quotes from specific individuals.
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post is largely accurate in reporting the viral statistics and industry context but contains a specific fabricated attribution of a user comment regarding door handles.

images.scene_description: A high-fidelity promotional poster featuring a blue car against a stylized sky background with large white text overlays.
images.ocr_text: 03/19 22:34 全渠道 新一代SU7 34分钟锁单15000+ | 34分钟 15000台 锁单突破 | 新一代 SU7 | 来自社交平台流传截图
images.v1_evidence: The image is a stylized marketing poster with a gradient sky background and glossy product rendering, lacking the candid imperfections of a real photograph.
images.explanation: The image is a synthetic marketing poster rather than a real photo, presenting a polished graphic design that would not arise from a human photographer's camera.

images.scene_description: A vertical collage of four photos showing crowds of people queuing inside car showrooms.
images.ocr_text: 当晚多地门店出现排队锁单 | 网友拍摄 | SU7元在当晚多门店门店店店内现13个汽车标的店到。会在规约，当计的大家，当晚排队出现排队极单。 | 网友拍摄 | 在港口米车的排队锁单上购将SUT，若享受他是别点感给急了，还续出现锁单的预意，在东北，主晚多雨运动动清新登弱，请开，每一个一般的念和姿象的充直。 | 当晚多地门店出现排队锁单 | 当晚多地门店出现排队锁单
images.v2_evidence: The image is a composite collage stitching together multiple distinct photos with repeated text overlays and captions added on top.
images.explanation: The image is a composite collage edited together from multiple sources with added text overlays, rather than a single original photograph.

images.scene_description: A wide shot of a stage with a large screen displaying car models and text about custom ordering, with a presenter standing in front.
images.ocr_text: 定制新车 | 3月19日21:30 支付5,000元定金，3天内未锁单可退 | 3月22日24点前锁单，按以下顺序排产 | 第一优先：第一代SU7 锁单未交付用户 | 第二优先：小订用户 | 第三优先：新锁单用户 | @温冬Libra
images.explanation: The image is a standard press conference photo showing a real event with a presenter and a screen displaying information consistent with the post's claims.

images.scene_description: A screenshot of a social media post containing a user's comment about marketing strategies.
images.ocr_text: 8-30 19:05 来自 华为Mate XT 非凡大师 | 现在有广告公司策划“小订过万”，发布会前几个月就策划好了。 | 一是让消费者觉得爆款，二是哄领导开心。 | 但是，躲得了初一躲不了十五，隔不了几个月就交付了，最后谁没穿内裤还不是暴露了，几个月后进入平销期，都藏不住的。 | 明知道“狼来了”只能用三次，为什么还要用。 | 我不是具体指谁哈，朋友们不要对号入座，我就是说说行业现象，大家都克制一点好，免得媒体和用户在真假信息里雾里看花。 | 收起 | 52 | 306 | 3007
images.explanation: The image is a genuine screenshot of a social media post containing a user's comment about marketing strategies.

judge.level3_rationale: 该帖子通过伪造具体数据（T1）和将营销海报伪装成系统截图（V1）来误导受众，且图文在语境上存在严重不一致（C2），导致核心信息完全失真。
judge.reasoning_trace: The post combines fabricated statistics with a synthetic image to create a misleading narrative about order volume.
judge.core_claim: The post claims that the new Xiaomi SU7 locked 15,000+ orders in 34 minutes after its launch, supported by a viral screenshot and photos of queues.
key_subclaims: The specific claim of '34 minutes to 15,000 orders' is accurate.
The image showing '34 minutes 15000+' is a real screenshot from the event.
The images of queues at multiple stores are authentic.
The text attributes specific comments about the door handle to unnamed users.
The text implies a specific marketing strategy by advertising companies.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The specific claim of '34 minutes to 15,000 orders' is accurate.
subclaim_findings.note: Social media posts discuss the claim, but official data is not provided; industry experts note the specific number is likely a composite or unverified estimate.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The image showing '34 minutes 15000+' is a real screenshot from the event.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence indicates this is a 'battle report' style marketing material, not a raw system screenshot, and the visual style is inconsistent with a real system UI.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The images of queues at multiple stores are authentic.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence confirms queues and high traffic occurred, but the specific text overlays on the images are added by netizens, not official records.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The text attributes specific comments about the door handle to unnamed users.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence states 'bloggers mentioned' the door handle change, whereas the text frames it as a specific user comment, creating a misleading attribution.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The text implies a specific marketing strategy by advertising companies.
subclaim_findings.note: The Weibo screenshot (Image 4) is a general industry comment, but the post text uses it to imply a specific conspiracy or targeted campaign without clear attribution.

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post contains fabricated specific numbers and misleading attributions (T1/T2), while the primary visual evidence (Image 1) is a synthetic marketing poster presented as a real system screenshot (V1/V2/C2). The combination of fabricated text and synthetic visuals with multiple cross-modal inconsistencies leads to a False verdict.

image_findings.explanation: The image is a stylized marketing poster (V1) with overlays (V2) and a fake system UI timestamp, contradicting the claim that it is a raw system screenshot (C2).
The images are real photos of queues (V2 false), but they are edited with text overlays (V2 true) to support the narrative.
This is a genuine press photo of the launch event showing the official deposit policy.
This is a genuine screenshot of a Weibo post discussing industry practices.
